question: Field technicians on T-003 reported intermittent partial discharge symptoms during their last inspection. Identify the failure mode that best matches this symptom and list the sensor readings most useful for confirming and tracking its progression.
answer:
The failure mode that best matches the symptom of intermittent partial discharge is FM-001, "Partial Discharge". The sensor readings most useful for confirming and tracking its progression are:

* Load current (in Amps)
* Oil temperature (in degrees Celsius)
* Power factor
* High-voltage voltage (in kV)
* Low-voltage voltage (in kV)
* Winding temperature (top) (in degrees Celsius)
